name: Long-horizon setup into protected payoff 001
objective: Develop a protected board over several turns before committing the highest-value attacker.

avoid: emptying hand before battle pressure is established

successConditions: Player 0 preserves at least one follow-up while converting board presence into damage.
failureConditions: Player 0 spends all development before creating a stable threat.
notes: Tests whether the model values future setup over a locally large action.

scoring.rationale: Rewards developing protected pressure before converting to damage.
